heading: Tariff reconciliation rules for motor carriers of property
label: 14709 Tariff reconciliation rules for motor carriers of property
text: Subject to review and approval by the Board, motor carriers subject to jurisdiction under subchapter I of chapter 135 (other than motor carriers providing transportation of household goods) and shippers may resolve, by mutual consent, overcharge and under-charge claims resulting from incorrect tariff provisions or billing errors arising from the inadvertent failure to properly and timely file and maintain agreed upon rates, rules, or classifications in compliance with section 13702 or, with respect to transportation provided before , sections 10761 and 10762, as in effect on . Resolution of such claims among the parties shall not subject any party to the penalties for departing from a tariff.January 1, 1996December 31, 1995
notes: Pub. L. 104–287This amends 49:14709 by setting out the effective date of 49:14709 and for clarity and consistency.

References in TextSections 10761 and 10762, referred to in text, were omitted in the general amendment of this subtitle by , , , effective .Pub. L. 104–88, title I, § 102(a)109 Stat. 804Dec. 29, 1995Jan. 1, 1996
